findings.evidence: PR lines 77-82 and 144-151 prove each lemma by exactly invoking the existing API; Mathlib has `LinearMap.BilinForm.orthogonal_le` at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/BilinearForm/Orthogonal.lean:161`, `le_orthogonal_orthogonal` at line 163, `finrank_orthogonal` at line 291, and `orthogonal_orthogonal` at line 297.
findings.fix: Remove these wrapper declarations and use `ω.toBilinForm.orthogonal_le`, `ω.toBilinForm.le_orthogonal_orthogonal ω.isRefl`, `ω.toBilinForm.finrank_orthogonal ω.nondegenerate`, and `ω.toBilinForm.orthogonal_orthogonal ω.nondegenerate ω.isRefl` at call sites.
findings.issue: `orthogonal_le`, `le_orthogonal_orthogonal`, `finrank_orthogonal`, and `orthogonal_orthogonal` are direct namespace-specialized duplicates of existing bilinear-form orthogonal lemmas.

summary: The isotropic/Lagrangian vocabulary itself is not already present, but several new symplectic-complement lemmas are direct duplicates of existing `LinearMap.BilinForm` orthogonal API specialized through `ω.toBilinForm`. Those declarations should be removed or replaced by uses of the existing Mathlib lemmas.
